answer:
The sentence says that if a person lived with you for all of the present year, then the person was born or died in the present year and your home was their home for their entire life. This is a conditional where "lived with you for all of the present year" (L) implies both "born or died in the present year" (B ∨ D) and "your home was this person's home for the entire time" (H). The correct form is therefore L ⊃ [(B ∨ D) • H], which matches option G.

\boxed{G}
